title: Wilderness long trek
text: Distance, weather, and supply math; the map is optimistic.

title: Island castaway craft
text: Shore, wreckage, and social fracture among survivors.

title: Arctic whiteout expedition
text: Cold that edits plans; gear failure is a character.

title: Jungle ruin crawl
text: Green denser than walls; ruins breathe spores and old laws.

title: Desert well politics
text: Wells own people; mirages are honest about being liars.

title: Sea migration fleet
text: Many small boats, shared charts, and storms that reassign leadership.

title: High pass waystation
text: A waystation where storms decide who stays and who freezes on the trail.

title: Reef-camp on stilts
text: Stilt huts over bright water; night brings different fish and different thieves.

title: Glacier field lab
text: A half-buried lab studying ice that moves like it thinks.

title: Oasis market of clocks
text: An oasis that sells time as much as water; clocks disagree on purpose.

title: Ranger corps of thin lines
text: Rangers who mark safe paths and unmark unsafe people.

title: Water-rights compact
text: Families who own minutes at the well and sell hours of peace.

title: Fleet council of captains
text: Captains who vote with sails; minority boats get the worst charts.
examples: vote for south, wind says no

title: Weather-knee ache
text: An old ache predicts storms half the time; the other half it predicts regret.

title: Half-right forage
text: Identify food that is probably safe; confidence is the real poison risk.

title: Bridge-rope tension feel
text: Feel when a rope bridge is one step from failure; starts as anxiety, becomes data.

title: Clouded star path
text: Navigate by partial stars; overcast nights teach humility.

title: Tide-clock gut
text: Sense tide turns without a chart; lagoons still surprise you.

title: Harsh beautiful land
text: Landscapes awe and kill with the same honesty; people are smaller than weather.

title: Wreck on an unnamed shore
text: Surf, splinters, and a count of survivors that keeps changing.

title: Map with a deliberate gap
text: A guide sells a map with a white patch labeled only as ask later.

title: Caravan seat lottery
text: Seats assigned by lot; your seat-mate is a problem with a name.
